data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of weather observing stations available in the NOAA network. Returns station objects with metadata including station ID, name, geographic coordinates, and elevation. Use pagination parameters (limit, offset) to control result set size.

data.current_description: Fetch actual observed data values. Requires datasetid, startdate, and enddate parameters.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve observed climate data values from NOAA stations for a specified dataset and time period. Required parameters: datasetid, startdate, and enddate. Use pagination parameters (limit, offset) to control result set size. Data is returned in chronological order by default.

data.current_description: List available datasets or filter by parameters.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve available climate data categories with optional filtering
data.description_suggestion: Returns a paginated list of available data categories within climate datasets. Data categories organize climate observations (e.g., temperature, precipitation, wind). Use this operation to explore what types of climate measurements are available before selecting specific data types.
